claims.claim_description: The dashboard displays click count and link details for each short URL
A QR code can be generated for a short URL
Visiting a non-existent short code returns 404
Creating a short URL with an invalid destination URL is rejected
Registering with an already-used email is rejected
A user cannot see or manage links created by another user
Created short URLs persist and are retrievable after creation
User password is never returned in API responses

evidence.actual: seeded user found but password not recoverable from code.

claims.error: seeded user found but password not recoverable from code.

tier2.intent: URL shortener with user auth, create short URLs, redirect, click tracking, dashboard with stats, custom short codes, QR codes

journeys.name: Unauthenticated Visitor Follows Short URL
journeys.description: A visitor clicks a short URL and gets redirected to the original destination without needing an account

journeys.name: New User Creates Short URL And Views Dashboard
journeys.description: A new user registers, creates a short URL, and views their dashboard to see the link with click stats

journeys.name: New User Creates Custom Short Code
journeys.description: A new user registers and creates a short URL with a custom vanity code, then verifies it works

journeys.name: New User Generates QR Code For Short URL
journeys.description: A new user creates a short URL and generates a QR code for it to share offline

journeys.name: Returning User Checks Click Analytics
journeys.description: A returning user logs in to check click statistics on their previously created short URLs

journeys.name: Returning User Updates And Deletes Short URL
journeys.description: A returning user logs in, updates the destination of an existing short URL, then deletes another one

journeys.name: Admin Views All Users And URLs
journeys.description: An admin logs in and views all users' URLs and system-wide statistics

journeys.name: Duplicate Custom Code Rejected
journeys.description: A user tries to create a short URL with a custom code that already exists and gets an appropriate error

journeys.name: Nonexistent Short Code Returns 404
journeys.description: A visitor tries to access a short code that doesn't exist and receives a proper error

An authenticated user can create a short URL by providing a destination URL

evidence.expected: status in [200, 201], body contains ['example.com'], JSON has keys ['id', 'code', 'url']

results.claim_description: An authenticated user can create a short URL with a custom short code
Creating a short URL with a duplicate custom code is rejected
Visiting a short code URL redirects to the original destination URL
Each redirect increments the click count for the link
